texto: Parenthood offers many lessons in patience and sacrifice. But ultimately, it is a lesson in humility. The very best thing about your life is a short stage in someone else’s story.
explicacao: Citação de Michael Gerson sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Parenthood offers many lessons in patience and sacrifice. But ultimately, it is a lesson in humil…” articula reflexao, parenthood, offers em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
